meta.title: Naman Bhatt · Data & AI Developer
meta.description: Naman Bhatt — Data Engineer & AI Developer. Snowflake, Databricks, RAG-based AI agents, data quality frameworks.

hero.availability: Associate IT Developer · Data Engineering & AI · Medtronic
hero.bio: Associate IT Developer at Medtronic with hands-on experience across the full data engineering lifecycle — from ingestion and curation to production-grade data quality frameworks. Skilled in building scalable pipelines on Snowflake and Databricks, and applying RAG-based AI agents to deliver governed, natural-language access to enterprise data.

about.label: about me
paragraphs: Associate IT Developer at Medtronic with an M.Tech in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning. I work across the full data engineering lifecycle — building scalable pipelines on Snowflake and Databricks, and production-grade data quality frameworks that keep enterprise data reliable and governed.

Passionate about combining data engineering rigor with applied AI — designing RAG-based agents that give business teams natural-language access to trusted data. Proven track record of resolving production issues, driving cross-functional adoption, and improving platform reliability across large enterprise data hubs.

skills.label: tech stack
skills.heading: Skills & Tools
skills.sub: From raw source systems to governed, analytics-ready platforms — the full data & AI toolkit.

experience.label: experience
experience.heading: Work Experience
experience.sub: Building enterprise data platforms and AI agents at Medtronic.

bullets: Led migration and modernization of the enterprise DIGIC Data Quality framework from Snowflake to Databricks, ensuring continuity of critical controls on a scalable, cloud-native architecture.

Built a RAG-based Enterprise Market Share Agent in Snowflake for the EMEA RLM team, enabling natural-language access to governed data across 15 countries, 4,000+ accounts and 600+ users (75%+ adoption).
Built reusable frameworks for automated data quality onboarding across new tables and data hubs — reducing manual effort, improving governance and ensuring reliable Dev/Test/Stage/Prod deployments.
Awarded a CTO Recognition Award for outstanding contribution to data engineering and AI-driven innovation.
Onboarded USCV, N360 and MedSurg Salesforce instances to Snowflake and built curation modules enabling role-based reporting for the Global Commercial Team and CRM stakeholders.

Drove ingestion and curation initiatives across enterprise data hubs (Definitive Healthcare, Medidata, MedSurg, SFN360, Eloqua, SAP, Salesforce), supporting user groups from small teams to 500+ users.
Optimized PRV dispatch operations and supported Action Taken Report (ATR) submissions to the District Control Room.

certifications.label: credentials
certifications.heading: Certifications
certifications.sub: Cloud, GenAI and data-engineering credentials backing the work.

cta.sub: Data engineering · AI agents · Analytics platforms · RAG systems — full-time roles and collaborations.
